calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-13-2005 Off Calendar

Motion Permitting Declaration Of Plaintiff In Lieu Of Live Testimony At Hearing For Default Judgment
Off Calendar May-17-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Carl Salcedo.
Mary E. Mayo, Esq. for Plaintiff: Graphic Arts Center, Inc.
Order permitting declaration of plaintiff in lieu of live testimony at hearing for default judgment is in file.
After hearing the evidence presented and declaration of Paula Cooley, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Ozone Advertising, Inc. as follows:
Damages $131,934.10
Prejudgment Interest $71,244.20
Attorney's Fees $650.00
Costs is waived, for a total of $203,828.30
Judgment signed in open court.
